description: Urban Air Mobility (UAM) and Smart City integration. Overcome GPS multi-pathing, dense RF interference, and regulatory compliance through Edge computing and computer vision in complex urban canyons.
learning_objectives: Understand the types of urban infrastructure requiring inspection and their failure modes
Build and train AI models for defect detection (cracks, corrosion, spalling, graffiti, vegetation encroachment)
Create geospatial data pipelines for asset inventory and change detection over time
Deploy optimized models on edge hardware for real‑time inspection during flights
Implement automated reporting and integration with city GIS and asset management systems
Design safe inspection flight paths in urban environments (GPS‑denied, obstacles)
Comply with aviation regulations for urban operations

modules.title: Urban Canyon VIO & Navigation
modules.description: Navigate accurately when GPS/GNSS signals bounce off skyscrapers leading to multi-pathing errors.
topics: LTE/5G positioning using Cell Tower Triangulation
SLAM (Simultaneous Localization and Mapping) in dynamic environments
Optical flow processing on Edge TPUs

modules.title: Traffic & Crowd Flow Analytics
modules.description: Process vast amounts of urban data on the edge to protect privacy while streaming derived analytics to city dashboards.
topics: Edge-based pose estimation for pedestrian flow
Vehicle tracking & trajectory forecasting with LSTMs
MAC Address / WiFi Sniffing spatial density mapping
Streaming telemetry to city-scale Apache Kafka brokers

modules.title: UTM & Airspace Deconfliction
modules.description: Integrate with Unmanned Traffic Management (UTM) networks to safely coordinate with other delivery and inspection drones.
topics: UTM API integration (e.g., Altitude Angel, AirMap)
Adhering to FAA/EASA regulatory data transmission protocols

capstone_project.name: Autonomous Bridge Inspection Drone
capstone_project.description: Build and test a drone system that autonomously inspects a bridge structure (or a simulated one). The drone must fly a predefined path, capture high‑resolution images, run defect segmentation on‑board, generate a report with defect locations and severity, and upload the data to an asset management system. Achieve detection of cracks >1 mm with >90% recall and precision.
deliverables: ROS 2 nodes for inspection flight and defect logging
PostGIS asset database with inspection results
HIL simulation report with performance metrics
Safety plan and regulatory waiver application (mock)

glossary.definition: Visual-Inertial Odometry. The process of estimating the state (pose and velocity) of an agent by fusing camera and IMU measurements.
Unmanned Traffic Management. A system to manage drone traffic in lower airspace.
The propagation phenomenon that results in radio signals reaching the receiving antenna by two or more paths. Causes GPS errors in cities.
Simultaneous Localization and Mapping. The Computational problem of constructing or updating a map of an unknown environment while simultaneously keeping track of an agent's location within it.
